section_about_text: My name is Jose Luiz Bruiani Barco and I am {{age}} years old. I am a full-stack developer, creating responsive interfaces and functional applications. I am passionate about transforming ideas into practical and intuitive digital solutions. In addition to Portuguese, I also communicate in English, which allows me to collaborate on international projects and keep up with global technological trends
